description_long: This is a large, modern motor yacht with a streamlined white hull and multiple decks, featuring tan and gray accents. The vessel has a prominent superstructure with a blue and black funnel located centrally, and a spacious open deck area at the stern. Rows of rectangular windows line the hull, suggesting multiple interior levels for passenger accommodation. The bow is sharply pointed, and the stern is squared off, with visible railings and deck features. The yacht's exterior is smooth and sleek, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on clean lines. The overall design is indicative of a luxury cruise or private yacht, built for comfort and style.
description: A large, modern white motor yacht with multiple decks, tan accents, and a central blue funnel. It features a streamlined hull, rows of windows, and spacious open deck areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the yacht, with rows of windows, tan deck surfaces, and the central blue funnel clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the squared stern, open deck area, and the blue funnel positioned centrally on the superstructure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the hull windows, tan deck, and the yacht's pointed bow.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the sharp bow, layered deck structure, and the central placement of the funnel.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a streamlined, pointed bow and squared stern, white in color with tan deck accents and rows of rectangular windows along the hull. No visible keels or chines.
attribute_deck_layout: Multi-level deck with tan surfaces, open areas at the stern, central blue funnel, and visible railings. The upper deck is mostly clear, with a superstructure occupying the central portion.
attribute_cabin_structure: Large, rectangular superstructure with multiple rows of windows on both sides, indicating several interior cabins. The exterior is smooth with no visible doors or detailed cabin features.
